title: New Entertainment Project
wikitext:
[]: New Entertainment Project             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Sep 05, 2005 9:35 pm Does anybody know WTF is this?: http://www.projecteva.jp/index.html Is it something about games in the likes of Pachinko or the other casino game, coin slot or something I think is the name in englsih??

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Sep 06, 2005 8:18 am It could just be a really cool fansite. But then, I didn't look around too much.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Sep 06, 2005 9:22 am I think it's a slot machine with an Eva theme. Either that or an Eva-R -esque fan extension. I have no idea, and I'm not sure if I want to have one.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Sep 06, 2005 12:03 pm Yeah, but it's linked directly from the Eva site @ gainax.co.jp It has certain official weight I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Sep 09, 2005 12:29 pm The index page has a countdown of sorts. At the time of this writing the countdown is at 260 hours 30 minutes. A little less than 11 days.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:16 pm Anyone speak Japanese???

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 26, 2005 10:23 pm Just some sort of Eva themed gambling parlor game. Nothing of real interest.
